speech:
Here's everything I can help you with! 📋

**Booking & Services:**
• "Book a service" - Schedule maintenance
• "Emergency breakdown" - Get immediate help
• "Check booking status" - Track your bookings
• "Cancel booking" - Cancel a scheduled service

**Information:**
• "Find a mechanic" - Browse available mechanics
• "Service pricing" - View our rates
• "Available services" - See what we offer
• "Working hours" - Check our timings

**Account:**
• "Register" - Create a new account
• "Contact support" - Get human assistance

Just type any of these to get started!
